positive: A majestic, stylized deep forest scene at dusk. The composition should be a circular vignette centered on a cluster of bioluminescent flora and fauna. Imagine intricate, intertwined vines, giant glowing mushrooms, and exotic crystalline leaves. Dominant colors are deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and brilliant cyan, contrasted by warm amber glows from hidden lantern-like flowers. The style should be highly detailed, illustrative, and reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets modern mystical graphic design. Clean silhouettes are paramount, creating a seamless, cohesive pattern suitable for repeat or large format print. Cinematic lighting emphasizes glow effects and high contrast. The background should have strong texture but remain abstractly nature-based. High resolution, vector quality, maximalist details, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, low detail, messy, ugly, watermark, copyright, logo, brand, portrait, photography, photo-realistic, depth of field
